src/main/java/hr/ja/weboo/UserListPage.j.general_idea: Changed the table layout strategy from fitting data with fill to fitting columns.

src/main/java/hr/ja/weboo/UserPage.java.general_idea: Added import for Spring's ButtonTag class.
Added debug logging to track form submission events.

src/main/java/hr/ja/weboo/entity/Data1.j.general_idea: Add Lombok @Data annotation to automatically generate getters, setters, toString, equals, and hashCode methods.
Add a 'name' field to the Data1 entity class.

src/main/java/hr/ja/weboo/lib/Form.java.general_idea: Added import for LambdaUtil from Log4j.
Added import for LambdaSafe from Spring Boot.
Added import for HandlerMethod from Spring Web.
Removed empty line before text method.
Added debug logging to print the class name of the consumer.
src/main/java/hr/ja/weboo/lib/Form.java.human_impl:
Class<? extends FormSubmitConsumer> aClass = consumer.getClass();
        log.debug(aClass.getName());

src/main/java/hr/ja/weboo/lib/Form.java.general_idea: Removed debug logging that printed the consumer hash code.
Updated commented out code to reflect new debugging intent.

src/main/java/hr/ja/weboo/lib/MyUtil.jav.general_idea: Consolidate multiple specific Spring web context imports into a single wildcard import.
Comment out a debug log statement to remove runtime noise.
Replace StandardServletAsyncWebRequest with ServletWebRequest for request binding.

src/main/java/hr/ja/weboo/lib/Table.java.general_idea: Add @EqualsAndHashCode annotation to override default equality behavior by excluding the superclass fields.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 3.1.0 to 3.2.4 to align with newer ecosystem standards.
Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Define a property for the JTE template engine version to manage dependency consistency.
Add the JTE library as a project dependency to enable template rendering.
Update the Quarkus Qute dependency from 3.1.2.Final to 3.2.2.Final.
Explicitly configure the Maven compiler plugin to use source/target 21 and enable preview features.
Add the JTE Maven plugin to generate Java sources from JTE templates during the build.
Configure the Maven resources plugin to copy binary static content generated by JTE to the output directory.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Re-enable the default Spring Boot whitelabel error page.
